name: pm-skills
description: 38 product management skills for AI agents, covering the full product lifecycle from discovery through iteration. Includes the v2.11.0 Meeting Skills Family (5 cross-cutting skills governed by a shared contract with enforcing CI), lean canvas, persona, structured templates, real-world examples, workflows, an interactive skill builder, and lifecycle tools for validating and iterating skills. Follows the agentskills.io specification.
